reference: IF I DROWN BY THE WAY THIS WILL BE MY LAST LETTER AND LIKE A WILL I BEQUEATH ALL MY KINDNESS TO YOU IN IT WITH A CHARGE NEVER TO BESTOW IT ALL UPON ANOTHER MISTRESS LEST MY GHOST RISE AGAIN AND HAUNT YOU
text: If I drown, by the way, this will be my last letter; and, like a will, I bequeath all my kindness to you in it—with a charge, never to bestow it all upon another mistress, lest my ghost rise again and haunt you.
